beat.title: Recap And Positioning
beat.boundaryReason: The session opens with recap of the Feywild party, the sent-away human, and Lord Endless Ending beckoning Edric, then reestablishes where each character is and what they look and feel like; the next beat begins when Kaito pulls the group into a tactical debrief about what they have learned.
dateEvidence: session.yaml gives drStart and drEnd as 1740-10-05.
u0010-u0018 reiterate that the party is in the post-sunset gloaming.
u0103-u0109 recap the clock striking zero and Lord Endless Ending beckoning Edric immediately before this scene resumes.

sourceLines.text: Oh, awesome.
Alright, so last session opened with y'all still in the tunnel, Holda having just closed the door behind you.
sourceLines.raw: [u0002 | 00:00:03.360-00:00:11.500 | DM] Alright, so last session opened with y'all still in the tunnel, Holda having just closed the door behind you.

sourceLines.text: And…
You emerged into, as you continued down the tunnel, it stopped being root, and it seemed instead like it was…
sourceLines.raw: [u0004 | 00:00:13.640-00:00:21.170 | DM] You emerged into, as you continued down the tunnel, it stopped being root, and it seemed instead like it was…

sourceLines.text: I don't know, coral, or bone, or more like the skeleton of a house than a house itself.
sourceLines.raw: [u0005 | 00:00:21.910-00:00:27.350 | DM] I don't know, coral, or bone, or more like the skeleton of a house than a house itself.

sourceLines.text: And what you emerged into was…
sourceLines.raw: [u0006 | 00:00:27.780-00:00:31.060 | DM] And what you emerged into was…

sourceLines.text: A sort of, like, a ruined…
A house made of skeletal roots.
sourceLines.raw: [u0008 | 00:00:36.090-00:00:39.540 | DM] A house made of skeletal roots.

sourceLines.text: In a kind of an echo or copy of what… where you started. But you climb out of the cellar onto a road, and find yourself in, what hopefully your characters, I've guessed right by now is the Feywild.
sourceLines.raw: [u0009 | 00:00:39.690-00:00:54.140 | DM] In a kind of an echo or copy of what… where you started. But you climb out of the cellar onto a road, and find yourself in, what hopefully your characters, I've guessed right by now is the Feywild.

sourceLines.text: It's just after twilight in the… I forgot, there's an absolutely wonderful word, glome, for this. So you're in the glome.
sourceLines.raw: [u0010 | 00:00:54.450-00:01:04.950 | DM] It's just after twilight in the… I forgot, there's an absolutely wonderful word, glome, for this. So you're in the glome.

sourceLines.text: And…
Is it just after Twilight, or just before Twilight?
sourceLines.raw: [u0012 | 00:01:06.360-00:01:08.599 | Edric] Is it just after Twilight, or just before Twilight?

sourceLines.text: The sun has set Mmm… 10 or 15 minutes ago.
sourceLines.raw: [u0013 | 00:01:09.260-00:01:13.460 | DM] The sun has set Mmm… 10 or 15 minutes ago.

sourceLines.text: Despite, just as a sidebar,
sourceLines.raw: [u0014 | 00:01:14.270-00:01:17.990 | DM] Despite, just as a sidebar,

sourceLines.text: In all of the images I generate.
sourceLines.raw: [u0015 | 00:01:18.160-00:01:20.150 | DM] In all of the images I generate.

sourceLines.text: Photoshop really stubbornly does not like generating images after the sun has set, no matter how clearly and repeatedly I ask it to. So.
sourceLines.raw: [u0016 | 00:01:20.480-00:01:30.649 | DM] Photoshop really stubbornly does not like generating images after the sun has set, no matter how clearly and repeatedly I ask it to. So.

sourceLines.text: But we are…
Definitely after sunset. The sun is far enough below the horizon that even, like, climbing up on a hill or something, you're not gonna have a sightline to it.
sourceLines.raw: [u0018 | 00:01:32.150-00:01:39.609 | DM] Definitely after sunset. The sun is far enough below the horizon that even, like, climbing up on a hill or something, you're not gonna have a sightline to it.

sourceLines.text: As you start down the road, you start coming across a few different corpses.
sourceLines.raw: [u0019 | 00:01:40.020-00:01:46.050 | DM] As you start down the road, you start coming across a few different corpses.

sourceLines.text: And the features they all share is they all appear to have been running back towards the root house that you emerged from.
sourceLines.raw: [u0020 | 00:01:46.190-00:01:53.689 | DM] And the features they all share is they all appear to have been running back towards the root house that you emerged from.

sourceLines.text: And their heads are all gone one way or another. So the first one you find, it is just smashed to absolute oblivion.
sourceLines.raw: [u0021 | 00:01:54.150-00:02:02.370 | DM] And their heads are all gone one way or another. So the first one you find, it is just smashed to absolute oblivion.

sourceLines.text: One of them… the whole body is burned, another one is just missing its head entirely, having been decapitated.
sourceLines.raw: [u0022 | 00:02:03.860-00:02:11.949 | DM] One of them… the whole body is burned, another one is just missing its head entirely, having been decapitated.

sourceLines.text: And, the AI summary says.
The road discoveries turn the mood from treasure-hungry excitement to fear of a trap.
sourceLines.raw: [u0024 | 00:02:19.500-00:02:23.609 | DM] The road discoveries turn the mood from treasure-hungry excitement to fear of a trap.

sourceLines.text: Kinda true.
Yeah, right, fair.
Txarro casts augury, wondering if going into the manor is weal or woe, and asking about the treaty is wise.
sourceLines.raw: [u0027 | 00:02:30.450-00:02:37.610 | DM] Txarro casts augury, wondering if going into the manor is weal or woe, and asking about the treaty is wise.

sourceLines.text: It comes back, maybe unsurprisingly, as both.
sourceLines.raw: [u0028 | 00:02:37.840-00:02:40.940 | DM] It comes back, maybe unsurprisingly, as both.

sourceLines.text: You thought about different ways to go in and explore, but instead, Txarro sends the familiar, an eastern screech owl, to go look around.
sourceLines.raw: [u0029 | 00:02:41.170-00:02:50.190 | DM] You thought about different ways to go in and explore, but instead, Txarro sends the familiar, an eastern screech owl, to go look around.

sourceLines.text: And sees behind this gigantic hedgerow that conceals the party from sight, just this enormous party in the process of breaking up.
sourceLines.raw: [u0030 | 00:02:50.310-00:03:00.420 | DM] And sees behind this gigantic hedgerow that conceals the party from sight, just this enormous party in the process of breaking up.

sourceLines.text: But continually in the process of breaking up. If the party breaking up is, like, a half-hour event in a regular party, it is indefinitely that
sourceLines.raw: [u0031 | 00:03:00.650-00:03:11.820 | DM] But continually in the process of breaking up. If the party breaking up is, like, a half-hour event in a regular party, it is indefinitely that

sourceLines.text: half hour, exactly. It is endlessly in the process of ending. Not in the sense of people performing the same loops over and over again, but doing endless variations.
sourceLines.raw: [u0032 | 00:03:11.880-00:03:23.950 | DM] half hour, exactly. It is endlessly in the process of ending. Not in the sense of people performing the same loops over and over again, but doing endless variations.

sourceLines.text: Or… In the quality of…

you know how, like, if you're, like, watching a show or something and you're not paying attention, and then you look back up and you're like, wait, I didn't… they're still there? I didn't think they were still there. Oh, well, I guess they're still there. Like, that… that's sort of a thing.
sourceLines.raw: [u0034 | 00:03:31.890-00:03:43.730 | DM] you know how, like, if you're, like, watching a show or something and you're not paying attention, and then you look back up and you're like, wait, I didn't… they're still there? I didn't think they were still there. Oh, well, I guess they're still there. Like, that… that's sort of a thing.

sourceLines.text: At the gate, you encounter two guards who,
sourceLines.raw: [u0035 | 00:03:44.090-00:03:53.100 | DM] At the gate, you encounter two guards who,

sourceLines.text: Who sniff you and sniff the air and seem to be trying to smell something out of you.
sourceLines.raw: [u0036 | 00:03:53.520-00:04:02.190 | DM] Who sniff you and sniff the air and seem to be trying to smell something out of you.

sourceLines.text: somewhere between old men acting like dogs and dogs acting like old men, and they say that you're just in time, because the party's ending, but they don't know anything about what's going on inside. Repeatedly, they say, we belong to the road, not to the party.
sourceLines.raw: [u0037 | 00:04:02.230-00:04:15.849 | DM] somewhere between old men acting like dogs and dogs acting like old men, and they say that you're just in time, because the party's ending, but they don't know anything about what's going on inside. Repeatedly, they say, we belong to the road, not to the party.

sourceLines.text: And they know that the bodies came from further up, and that travelers sometimes have a bad smell that they have to stop from spreading. And I think they describe the bad smell as
sourceLines.raw: [u0038 | 00:04:16.940-00:04:29.300 | DM] And they know that the bodies came from further up, and that travelers sometimes have a bad smell that they have to stop from spreading. And I think they describe the bad smell as

sourceLines.raw: [u0039 | 00:04:29.920-00:04:33.079 | DM] Exactly the opposite of every other smell there is.

sourceLines.text: Which is sort of in line with the unhelpfulness of their answers.
sourceLines.raw: [u0040 | 00:04:33.380-00:04:37.389 | DM] Which is sort of in line with the unhelpfulness of their answers.

sourceLines.text: Or the inability of mortals to comprehend the fey.
sourceLines.raw: [u0041 | 00:04:38.560-00:04:42.129 | DM] Or the inability of mortals to comprehend the fey.

sourceLines.text: They explained that you're in the Twilight Kingdom, a place of a dozen-dozen houses, with the fixed sun always fixed just below the horizon, and the lord of this house instructed them to let in any mortal.
sourceLines.raw: [u0042 | 00:04:43.690-00:04:54.560 | DM] They explained that you're in the Twilight Kingdom, a place of a dozen-dozen houses, with the fixed sun always fixed just below the horizon, and the lord of this house instructed them to let in any mortal.

sourceLines.text: Because you don't have gifts to give, they accept your bribe of the dreams that you have.
sourceLines.raw: [u0043 | 00:04:54.940-00:05:02.389 | DM] Because you don't have gifts to give, they accept your bribe of the dreams that you have.

sourceLines.text: And each of you has dreamed of Of different and, interesting and foreboding things.
sourceLines.raw: [u0044 | 00:05:02.610-00:05:10.039 | DM] And each of you has dreamed of Of different and, interesting and foreboding things.

sourceLines.text: Inside the gate, Like the background image, it's this long, sloping lawn falling away to the river.
sourceLines.raw: [u0045 | 00:05:11.110-00:05:20.950 | DM] Inside the gate, Like the background image, it's this long, sloping lawn falling away to the river.

sourceLines.text: And you chat first. I think overall, you sort of go looking for mortals. So you come across a pair of…
sourceLines.raw: [u0046 | 00:05:21.360-00:05:31.760 | DM] And you chat first. I think overall, you sort of go looking for mortals. So you come across a pair of…

sourceLines.raw: [u0047 | 00:05:32.820-00:05:38.910 | DM] Half-drunk Halflings, which probably rounds up to To holy drunk halflings.

sourceLines.text: Arguing with each other, and just sort of blown away that you're there.
sourceLines.raw: [u0048 | 00:05:39.300-00:05:44.189 | DM] Arguing with each other, and just sort of blown away that you're there.

sourceLines.text: They're from Chardon. They're from…

sourceLines.text: the outpost of Chardon on the Imperial frontier, and find your questions about all of that somewhere between nonsensical and hilarious.
sourceLines.raw: [u0050 | 00:05:48.980-00:05:59.089 | DM] the outpost of Chardon on the Imperial frontier, and find your questions about all of that somewhere between nonsensical and hilarious.

sourceLines.raw: [u0051 | 00:06:00.210-00:06:03.499 | DM] They arrived in the Feywild in the morning.

sourceLines.text: And got up to a variety of adventures before getting to the party in full swing.
sourceLines.raw: [u0052 | 00:06:03.690-00:06:08.349 | DM] And got up to a variety of adventures before getting to the party in full swing.

sourceLines.text: And…
I don't know, your best guess, which your characters did not actually make, but probably you as the players have pieced together, is they…
sourceLines.raw: [u0054 | 00:06:12.420-00:06:19.050 | DM] I don't know, your best guess, which your characters did not actually make, but probably you as the players have pieced together, is they…

sourceLines.text: Without any consciousness of the passing of that time.

sourceLines.text: One mortal who's sleeping behind a couch in the library, who looks like they probably had a little too much earlier in the night and are still sleeping it off, but very clearly a human, probably in his 20s.
sourceLines.raw: [u0058 | 00:06:37.130-00:06:52.610 | DM] One mortal who's sleeping behind a couch in the library, who looks like they probably had a little too much earlier in the night and are still sleeping it off, but very clearly a human, probably in his 20s.

sourceLines.raw: [u0060 | 00:07:00.510-00:07:05.099 | DM] is actually not technically the D&D monster Rakshasa, so much as,

sourceLines.raw: [u0061 | 00:07:05.310-00:07:15.409 | DM] inspired by the original first edition AD&D illustration of a Rakshasa that I have really liked a lot for the last 35 years.

sourceLines.text: And, sober and coherent, unlike pretty much anyone else at the party, sitting on this porch all by himself, smoking a pipe. And seeing that you are mortals also invites you to sit down and chat. I think Ayveen and Edric start in the conversation.

sourceLines.raw: [u0064 | 00:07:45.330-00:07:57.350 | DM] And in the course of chatting, he explains that he got obsessed somewhere along the way with this moment in time, this moment of twilight in sort of all of its permutations.

sourceLines.raw: [u0066 | 00:08:01.330-00:08:08.490 | DM] In the past, though he's conscious of the weirdness of time here, but did not share how long ago he's from.

sourceLines.raw: [u0067 | 00:08:08.620-00:08:16.720 | DM] Went… essentially went wandering through the Twilight Kingdoms, wanting to understand what all the different kinds of Twilight were.

And

pieced together the story of why the party is ending. This… this celebration is ending. And he offers to trade it first for a month and a day in Ayveen's house in Tollen, but she negotiates him down to keys.

beat.title: Planning The Approach
beat.boundaryReason: The party compares what they know about the clock, the pact, the sent-away mortal, the road, and the neighbor's house, while Txarro keeps the owl on the departing woman and the group decides to approach Lord Endless Ending with gifts; the next beat begins with the formal audience.
dateEvidence: session.yaml gives drStart and drEnd as 1740-10-05.
u0385-u0404 continue directly from the just-sent mortal and Txarro's owl watching her leave.
u0555-u0645 keep the group at the ending party and move them toward speaking with Lord Endless Ending.

beat.title: Gifts For Endless Ending
beat.boundaryReason: The party is presented to Lord Endless Ending, reads the badger butler's anxious surface thoughts, offers gifts of bird calls, holy water, performance, sleight of hand, and moonrise music, and is formally welcomed; the next beat begins when the party explains why they are there.
dateEvidence: session.yaml gives drStart and drEnd as 1740-10-05.

sourceLines.raw: [u0823 | 01:10:48.060-01:10:52.290 | DM] We feel it with our breath in our mouths and our hearts. The truest art.

sourceLines.text: Lighting up the darkest dark.
sourceLines.raw: [u0824 | 01:10:53.630-01:10:55.739 | DM] Lighting up the darkest dark.

sourceLines.text: May be fine forever.
The joy in the music.
All of us together.
The Lord sees us through it.
sourceLines.raw: [u0828 | 01:11:04.590-01:11:06.280 | DM] The Lord sees us through it.

sourceLines.text: And then, you know.
I was, like, deeply…
gunning.
He replies back, Your chords recall a time when paths were wide.
sourceLines.raw: [u0832 | 01:11:12.100-01:11:17.209 | DM] He replies back, Your chords recall a time when paths were wide.

sourceLines.text: And twilight hours held a grand decree.
sourceLines.raw: [u0833 | 01:11:18.860-01:11:22.560 | DM] And twilight hours held a grand decree.

sourceLines.text: We chased the wind with laughter as our guide convinced the world was ours to shape and see.
sourceLines.raw: [u0834 | 01:11:23.470-01:11:29.720 | DM] We chased the wind with laughter as our guide convinced the world was ours to shape and see.

sourceLines.text: Kaito's, like, genuinely like, this guy is fucking cool.
sourceLines.raw: [u0835 | 01:11:32.900-01:11:35.520 | Kaito Min] Kaito's, like, genuinely like, this guy is fucking cool.

sourceLines.text: I like this guy.
In the back of his mind, he's like.
sourceLines.raw: [u0837 | 01:11:41.450-01:11:43.479 | DM] In the back of his mind, he's like.

sourceLines.text: I wonder how much he… how much… I wonder how much he pays.
sourceLines.raw: [u0838 | 01:11:43.480-01:11:45.989 | Kaito Min] I wonder how much he… how much… I wonder how much he pays.

sourceLines.text: Tarek.
You could see his body visibly shift into aristocratic hobnobbing mode.
sourceLines.raw: [u0840 | 01:11:50.990-01:11:56.720 | DM] You could see his body visibly shift into aristocratic hobnobbing mode.

sourceLines.text: The way that he likes to pretend to be more than he is.
sourceLines.raw: [u0841 | 01:11:57.620-01:12:01.280 | Tarek] The way that he likes to pretend to be more than he is.

sourceLines.text: With a flourish of his open hands, he says, My Lord, if I may, and gestures to approach him.
sourceLines.raw: [u0842 | 01:12:02.640-01:12:09.220 | DM] With a flourish of his open hands, he says, My Lord, if I may, and gestures to approach him.

sourceLines.text: Moving closer.
He spreads his hands wide in invitation.
sourceLines.raw: [u0844 | 01:12:12.970-01:12:15.700 | DM] He spreads his hands wide in invitation.

sourceLines.text: And in a fluid gesture almost too quick to see, with empty hands, he reaches toward.
sourceLines.raw: [u0845 | 01:12:17.130-01:12:23.840 | DM] And in a fluid gesture almost too quick to see, with empty hands, he reaches toward.

sourceLines.text: I suppose, significantly upward, the center of the chest of the Lord, and from, as he's doing so, he says.
sourceLines.raw: [u0846 | 01:12:24.410-01:12:32.300 | Tarek] I suppose, significantly upward, the center of the chest of the Lord, and from, as he's doing so, he says.

sourceLines.text: My gift to you is to take something away.
sourceLines.raw: [u0847 | 01:12:33.740-01:12:36.019 | Tarek] My gift to you is to take something away.

sourceLines.text: This tiny fragment.
of death.
And you see, In his fingers, it's as though he has plucked.
sourceLines.raw: [u0850 | 01:12:40.630-01:12:44.789 | Tarek] And you see, In his fingers, it's as though he has plucked.

sourceLines.text: From the chest of the Lord, A tiny mouse skull.
sourceLines.raw: [u0851 | 01:12:44.790-01:12:48.839 | DM] From the chest of the Lord, A tiny mouse skull.

sourceLines.text: And then… With a puff of air, makes it vanish into thin air.
sourceLines.raw: [u0852 | 01:12:49.610-01:12:54.950 | DM] And then… With a puff of air, makes it vanish into thin air.

sourceLines.text: Gives a little bow and steps back.
sourceLines.raw: [u0853 | 01:12:55.640-01:12:57.359 | DM] Gives a little bow and steps back.

sourceLines.text: And there's, like, a musical accompaniment, like, with the… at the end.
sourceLines.raw: [u0854 | 01:12:57.360-01:13:01.359 | Kaito Min] And there's, like, a musical accompaniment, like, with the… at the end.

sourceLines.text: We have…
Of course, Kaito knows to play the cue at the right moment.
sourceLines.raw: [u0856 | 01:13:04.820-01:13:08.179 | Tarek] Of course, Kaito knows to play the cue at the right moment.

sourceLines.text: This, this is, this is just…
sourceLines.raw: [u0857 | 01:13:08.180-01:13:09.669 | Kaito Min] This, this is, this is just…

sourceLines.text: When a couple of the guests standing 10 or 15 feet away give a few claps until noticing they're the only ones, they stop and pretend to be doing something else, and Lord Ending replies, you spin a web of lies with practiced grace and think I fall into your clever snare.
sourceLines.raw: [u0858 | 01:13:11.100-01:13:30.389 | DM] When a couple of the guests standing 10 or 15 feet away give a few claps until noticing they're the only ones, they stop and pretend to be doing something else, and Lord Ending replies, you spin a web of lies with practiced grace and think I fall into your clever snare.

sourceLines.text: I wear a mask upon my smiling face.
sourceLines.raw: [u0859 | 01:13:30.550-01:13:34.120 | DM] I wear a mask upon my smiling face.

sourceLines.text: And act as though I am completely bare.
sourceLines.raw: [u0860 | 01:13:34.140-01:13:37.229 | DM] And act as though I am completely bare.

sourceLines.text: Hmm.
I guess I didn't like that one.
sourceLines.raw: [u0862 | 01:13:52.800-01:13:54.330 | Tarek] I guess I didn't like that one.

sourceLines.text: I mean, he'll look over to you and…
sourceLines.raw: [u0863 | 01:13:54.770-01:13:56.829 | DM] I mean, he'll look over to you and…

sourceLines.text: Raise an eyebrow in invitation, but not automatically.
sourceLines.raw: [u0864 | 01:13:57.640-01:14:00.919 | DM] Raise an eyebrow in invitation, but not automatically.

sourceLines.text: expecting.
I think he's been… You get the sense that he's amused… so far.
sourceLines.raw: [u0866 | 01:14:02.160-01:14:08.560 | DM] I think he's been… You get the sense that he's amused… so far.

sourceLines.text: But looks to you.
if you…
Will pull out from her calligrapher's case, something that not even her friends have gotten a close look at, which is a sheet of, sheet music
sourceLines.raw: [u0869 | 01:14:12.880-01:14:22.999 | Ayveen] Will pull out from her calligrapher's case, something that not even her friends have gotten a close look at, which is a sheet of, sheet music

sourceLines.text: intricately decorated around all the borders with art reflecting the moon, because of course it is Ayveen's, composition on, the moonrise. And she says,
sourceLines.raw: [u0870 | 01:14:23.580-01:14:37.849 | Ayveen] intricately decorated around all the borders with art reflecting the moon, because of course it is Ayveen's, composition on, the moonrise. And she says,

sourceLines.text: in this place, On the edge of night.
sourceLines.raw: [u0871 | 01:14:38.590-01:14:41.889 | Ayveen] in this place, On the edge of night.

sourceLines.text: I offer you my song of the moonrise, and I hand over the, like, beautiful sheet of paper and play a few bars of the introductory chords on my lute.
sourceLines.raw: [u0872 | 01:14:43.090-01:14:57.489 | Ayveen] I offer you my song of the moonrise, and I hand over the, like, beautiful sheet of paper and play a few bars of the introductory chords on my lute.

sourceLines.text: He looks deeply at the page and listens intently and nods to himself. The graceful ink begins to curve and flow. Across the page in loops of darkest night, each sweeping letter seems to catch the glow.
sourceLines.raw: [u0873 | 01:15:00.540-01:15:16.019 | DM] He looks deeply at the page and listens intently and nods to himself. The graceful ink begins to curve and flow. Across the page in loops of darkest night, each sweeping letter seems to catch the glow.

sourceLines.text: Of climbing stars and shifting moonrise light.
sourceLines.raw: [u0874 | 01:15:16.080-01:15:21.189 | DM] Of climbing stars and shifting moonrise light.

sourceLines.text: That's lovely, I've never seen a moonrise.
sourceLines.raw: [u0875 | 01:15:22.690-01:15:25.279 | DM] That's lovely, I've never seen a moonrise.

sourceLines.text: But now I've heard that.
He gestures up to the empty sky.
sourceLines.raw: [u0877 | 01:15:31.690-01:15:35.649 | DM] He gestures up to the empty sky.

sourceLines.text: Welcome.
Welcome to my home, I…
Regret you're here only as the party is coming to an end, that you couldn't have been here earlier.
sourceLines.raw: [u0880 | 01:15:44.110-01:15:50.799 | DM] Regret you're here only as the party is coming to an end, that you couldn't have been here earlier.

sourceLines.text: Seen the performers. Joined in the revelry then, but…
sourceLines.raw: [u0881 | 01:15:52.420-01:15:57.160 | DM] Seen the performers. Joined in the revelry then, but…

sourceLines.text: Though despair may hover in the corner, still there is time… yet. And this party's not yet done.
sourceLines.raw: [u0882 | 01:15:59.290-01:16:06.999 | DM] Though despair may hover in the corner, still there is time… yet. And this party's not yet done.

sourceLines.text: Welcome to my home.
It's not often… That I entertain… mortals.
sourceLines.raw: [u0884 | 01:16:18.960-01:16:24.680 | DM] It's not often… That I entertain… mortals.

sourceLines.text: It's not often that I have the chance to greet mortals. More often, it's my own folk, who I have the pleasure of receiving.
sourceLines.raw: [u0885 | 01:16:29.370-01:16:36.040 | DM] It's not often that I have the chance to greet mortals. More often, it's my own folk, who I have the pleasure of receiving.

sourceLines.text: So, indeed, it is a great…
Great gift to welcome you this evening.
sourceLines.raw: [u0887 | 01:16:39.480-01:16:42.360 | DM] Great gift to welcome you this evening.

sourceLines.text: In these small kingdoms, Not everyone passing through even makes their way to this home.
sourceLines.raw: [u0888 | 01:16:44.930-01:16:53.969 | DM] In these small kingdoms, Not everyone passing through even makes their way to this home.

sourceLines.text: Though often they're drawn by the light and the music.
sourceLines.raw: [u0889 | 01:16:54.340-01:16:58.190 | DM] Though often they're drawn by the light and the music.

sourceLines.text: What brings you here this evening?
sourceLines.raw: [u0890 | 01:16:59.640-01:17:02.069 | DM] What brings you here this evening?

sourceLines.text: In this hour.
Who's gonna tell him?

beat.title: The Twenty-Seventh Room
beat.boundaryReason: The party explains that they are trapped, learns Lord Endless Ending's account of the neighbor's door, the clock, the bargain, the 27th room, and the glass key, and presses him about the bodies and guards; the next beat begins when the Lord steps aside so the party can decide whether to agree.
dateEvidence: session.yaml gives drStart and drEnd as 1740-10-05.
u0897-u0906 frame the conversation as the same evening search for a way home.
u0995-u1003 and u1050-u1061 connect the clock, the neighbor's house, and the 27th room without any date change.

sourceLines.text: Txarro kind of looks around, and… well…
sourceLines.raw: [u0893 | 01:17:16.870-01:17:20.480 | Txarro] Txarro kind of looks around, and… well…

sourceLines.text: sort of step forward, and I think…
sourceLines.raw: [u0894 | 01:17:20.840-01:17:23.490 | Txarro] sort of step forward, and I think…

sourceLines.raw: [u0895 | 01:17:24.550-01:17:30.730 | Txarro] Sometimes when there is less charming or…

sourceLines.text: persuasion to be done in more serious business, Txarro often kind of takes the lead a little bit, and will sort of say.
sourceLines.raw: [u0896 | 01:17:31.880-01:17:40.080 | Txarro] persuasion to be done in more serious business, Txarro often kind of takes the lead a little bit, and will sort of say.

sourceLines.text: well… To be honest, we are…

sourceLines.text: We are kind of stuck in this realm.
sourceLines.raw: [u0898 | 01:17:50.350-01:17:52.360 | Txarro] We are kind of stuck in this realm.

sourceLines.text: We…
Came through a door that closed behind us, and…
sourceLines.raw: [u0900 | 01:17:55.900-01:18:02.149 | Txarro] Came through a door that closed behind us, and…

sourceLines.text: We don't know how to get out.
sourceLines.raw: [u0901 | 01:18:03.650-01:18:06.660 | Txarro] We don't know how to get out.

sourceLines.text: And your house was light and welcoming.
sourceLines.raw: [u0902 | 01:18:07.810-01:18:13.149 | Txarro] And your house was light and welcoming.

sourceLines.text: You're not the first.
To come here with just… such a problem.
sourceLines.raw: [u0904 | 01:18:25.180-01:18:28.380 | DM] To come here with just… such a problem.

sourceLines.text: And indeed, there is a way back home again.
sourceLines.raw: [u0905 | 01:18:30.290-01:18:33.429 | DM] And indeed, there is a way back home again.

sourceLines.text: Not in this house, but in the house of my nearest neighbors just up the road. There is such a door to bring you back to your own home.
sourceLines.raw: [u0906 | 01:18:33.910-01:18:48.910 | DM] Not in this house, but in the house of my nearest neighbors just up the road. There is such a door to bring you back to your own home.

sourceLines.text: which direction?
The setting sun to your left.
sourceLines.raw: [u0908 | 01:18:59.260-01:19:00.829 | DM] The setting sun to your left.

sourceLines.text: So this would be… The direction the woman was walking, or the other direction?
sourceLines.raw: [u0909 | 01:19:02.540-01:19:07.960 | Txarro] So this would be… The direction the woman was walking, or the other direction?

sourceLines.text: The direction the woman was walking. Okay. Yep. North.
sourceLines.raw: [u0910 | 01:19:08.140-01:19:11.259 | DM] The direction the woman was walking. Okay. Yep. North.

sourceLines.text: That… that…
That woman who left earlier?
sourceLines.raw: [u0912 | 01:19:12.320-01:19:13.860 | Txarro] That woman who left earlier?

sourceLines.text: She was going there?
sourceLines.raw: [u0913 | 01:19:16.590-01:19:18.230 | Txarro] She was going there?

sourceLines.text: Precisely.
And you see out of the corner of your eye, his eyes flick over to look at the grandfather clock on the far side of the room.
sourceLines.raw: [u0915 | 01:19:21.550-01:19:27.919 | DM] And you see out of the corner of your eye, his eyes flick over to look at the grandfather clock on the far side of the room.

sourceLines.text: Time is on the clock. Does it have hands? Are they pointing to anything?
sourceLines.raw: [u0916 | 01:19:28.960-01:19:33.049 | Edric] Time is on the clock. Does it have hands? Are they pointing to anything?

sourceLines.text: What a fascinating question. Let's pause the conversation to talk about this clock.
sourceLines.raw: [u0917 | 01:19:33.830-01:19:39.180 | DM] What a fascinating question. Let's pause the conversation to talk about this clock.

sourceLines.text: Amazing.
Question?
The grandfather clock.
What does the clock look like?
sourceLines.raw: [u0921 | 01:19:42.450-01:19:44.600 | Ayveen] What does the clock look like?

sourceLines.text: is… immense. It is, easily six and a half or seven feet tall, solid.
sourceLines.raw: [u0922 | 01:19:44.600-01:19:53.070 | DM] is… immense. It is, easily six and a half or seven feet tall, solid.

sourceLines.text: old, well-joined masterwork. There are… there is one dial,

sourceLines.text: There are a number of things going on in the face of the clock.
sourceLines.raw: [u0924 | 01:20:03.720-01:20:05.390 | DM] There are a number of things going on in the face of the clock.

sourceLines.text: One of the.
is the dial. The dial…
Even though it's a circle, and it seems to be in the format of, like, the…
sourceLines.raw: [u0927 | 01:20:08.460-01:20:13.499 | DM] Even though it's a circle, and it seems to be in the format of, like, the…

sourceLines.text: The number at the.

sourceLines.text: top and the sides and the bottom is a little bit larger. It is not a 12- or a 24-hour face. From this distance, all you can see is that each of the dial positions has 4 digits.

sourceLines.text: Oh, okay.
You'd have to get closer to see it.

sourceLines.text: No, no, no.

You meant to answer it that way.

sourceLines.text: And then below each one of those dials, so here's your big dial at the top, and then here's your four ones in a row underneath it, underneath each of those, is what looks like 6 numbers, like a 6-digit number that's below each of those 4 faces.
sourceLines.raw: [u0938 | 01:20:53.140-01:21:09.880 | DM] And then below each one of those dials, so here's your big dial at the top, and then here's your four ones in a row underneath it, underneath each of those, is what looks like 6 numbers, like a 6-digit number that's below each of those 4 faces.

sourceLines.text: and you cannot…
You probably can't really read the numbers from this distance, this clock's probably 20 or 30 feet away, but you can tell that those numbers are changing.

That is very strange, I love it.

I think he's just said that there is an exit up the road, and you all have fallen ominously silent.

beat.title: No Fey Bargains
beat.boundaryReason: The party privately debates the risks of helping Holda, trusting Lord Endless Ending, promising anything to a fey lord, and going to the neighbor's house; they inspect the clock, ask about Holda, and Kaito secures permission to leave without accepting a binding bargain.
dateEvidence: session.yaml gives drStart and drEnd as 1740-10-05.

beat.title: Clockwork And Number Dreams
beat.boundaryReason: Before leaving, the party clarifies the gate's future-dependent logic, questions the road guards, returns to ask about the clock, finds the sleeping member of the wizard's entourage, reads his number-dreams, and studies his books about possibility and brilliant numbers; the next beat begins when they finally turn away from the manor toward the river and other house.
dateEvidence: session.yaml gives drStart and drEnd as 1740-10-05.
u1658-u1673 explain that the gate can exist only because the party will go through the neighbor's door.
u1769-u1908 keep the investigation inside the same party house before the group decides again to go to the other house.

beat.title: The River And Scholar
beat.boundaryReason: Txarro tests the river and finds it loops back to the ending party, the clock strikes zero again, the party waits at the gate, and the newly awakened scholar leaves the house, uses his ring to bridge the language gap, and reveals he came from the 27th house; the next beat begins when the party pushes him on when he is from.

sourceLines.raw: [u2230 | 02:48:06.740-02:48:08.300 | Kaito Min] We don't know, we just got to the party.

sourceLines.text: Yeah, we… this thing was a rager when I got here. It was UNBELIEVABLE!
sourceLines.raw: [u2231 | 02:48:09.390-02:48:14.880 | DM] Yeah, we… this thing was a rager when I got here. It was UNBELIEVABLE!

sourceLines.text: We heard. I thought I could just, kinda…
sourceLines.raw: [u2232 | 02:48:15.070-02:48:20.360 | DM] We heard. I thought I could just, kinda…

sourceLines.text: Kick back, this was gonna be a nice… Time to… Have a drink, and… I had a drink.
sourceLines.raw: [u2233 | 02:48:20.480-02:48:28.580 | DM] Kick back, this was gonna be a nice… Time to… Have a drink, and… I had a drink.

sourceLines.text: And I felt a little woozy, and… I lay down, and…

sourceLines.text: Apparently everybody just left me here, which feels a little insulting, but…
sourceLines.raw: [u2235 | 02:48:33.790-02:48:38.020 | DM] Apparently everybody just left me here, which feels a little insulting, but…

sourceLines.text: Easy enough, we'll go catch up with them.
sourceLines.raw: [u2236 | 02:48:38.360-02:48:40.020 | DM] Easy enough, we'll go catch up with them.

sourceLines.text: Presumably they're back there.
sourceLines.raw: [u2237 | 02:48:41.060-02:48:43.239 | DM] Presumably they're back there.

sourceLines.text: Hmm.
He pauses, looking off, worried, into the distance and uncertain.
sourceLines.raw: [u2239 | 02:48:45.880-02:48:50.390 | DM] He pauses, looking off, worried, into the distance and uncertain.

beat.title: Monetheus And The Door
beat.boundaryReason: The scholar Monetheus realizes he is centuries out of time, explains Telestria, his order's work maintaining boundaries between worlds, brilliant-number location encoding, and the 27th house, then leads the party toward the lone door as Lord Endless Ending speaks a closing poem.
dateEvidence: session.yaml gives drStart and drEnd as 1740-10-05.
u2240-u2253 continue the same gate conversation as Monetheus asks when it is.
u2559-u2590 take the party down the road to the door in the same uninterrupted evening.

sourceLines.text: So, Tollen… wait a minute, why did you ask, when is it?
sourceLines.raw: [u2240 | 02:48:53.990-02:48:57.240 | DM] So, Tollen… wait a minute, why did you ask, when is it?

sourceLines.text: When is it? I know this place can mess with you, but when… is this?
sourceLines.raw: [u2241 | 02:48:57.470-02:49:02.450 | DM] When is it? I know this place can mess with you, but when… is this?

sourceLines.text: Drankor hasn't existed for, like, a thousand years.
sourceLines.raw: [u2242 | 02:49:04.350-02:49:08.029 | Txarro] Drankor hasn't existed for, like, a thousand years.

Utterly uncomprehending.

sourceLines.text: Oh, no.
Oh, no.

sourceLines.text: He sits down heavily, and puts both hands on his head. Oh, no, no. Puts his arm around it.

Oh, no!
Let it all sink in. Let it all sink in. Yup.

Wanna share what's on your mind? How'd you get here? How'd you get to the party?

sourceLines.text: From before the house.

Alright, alright, alright.

sourceLines.text: Make sure that everything stays where it's supposed to stay.

I don't really care about the…

sourceLines.raw: [u2274 | 02:51:03.100-02:51:09.290 | DM] I know I shouldn't say this, but apparently the entire empire is dead. I don't really care about the politics of the empire or the empire in general.

sourceLines.text: I, and we…
we're committed to keeping the outside out and the inside in, you know? The walls that separate things need to be maintained. You can't just build a wall and then leave it there forever. It needs…
sourceLines.raw: [u2276 | 02:51:14.130-02:51:23.869 | DM] we're committed to keeping the outside out and the inside in, you know? The walls that separate things need to be maintained. You can't just build a wall and then leave it there forever. It needs…

sourceLines.raw: [u2277 | 02:51:24.020-02:51:29.690 | DM] Maintenance, it needs repair, and that's what we did for… centuries.

sourceLines.text: I mean, not me, obviously.
The walls between the different parts of the universe.

sourceLines.text: Oh, man.

in metaphysical. Go ahead.

sourceLines.text: This is one of the things that people don't always… I mean, of course everyone in my order understands, but that people don't always understand is that the universe is a porous place. You think that,
sourceLines.raw: [u2283 | 02:51:47.150-02:51:58.469 | DM] This is one of the things that people don't always… I mean, of course everyone in my order understands, but that people don't always understand is that the universe is a porous place. You think that,

sourceLines.raw: [u2284 | 02:52:03.030-02:52:06.120 | DM] People build a dam to keep the water back.

sourceLines.text: They build a wall to keep the wind out, and they think that because no wind or water's coming through, that's what the separations are like between different parts of the universe, like the separation between this place, the Feywild, and the world, or between the dreaming world and the waking world, or…
sourceLines.raw: [u2285 | 02:52:09.080-02:52:26.700 | DM] They build a wall to keep the wind out, and they think that because no wind or water's coming through, that's what the separations are like between different parts of the universe, like the separation between this place, the Feywild, and the world, or between the dreaming world and the waking world, or…

sourceLines.text: But it's not like that at all. These things are porous, or…
sourceLines.raw: [u2287 | 02:52:28.970-02:52:32.459 | DM] But it's not like that at all. These things are porous, or…

sourceLines.text: Or… or there's holes between… I mean, you presumably came through a hole to get here of one form or another.
sourceLines.raw: [u2288 | 02:52:32.670-02:52:39.069 | DM] Or… or there's holes between… I mean, you presumably came through a hole to get here of one form or another.

Defense that the Empire needed to attend to wasn't its neighbors?

sourceLines.text: But the things that live on the other sides of these walls.

sourceLines.text: If the wall between this place, where we're standing right now, and our world collapsed tomorrow, imagine the…
sourceLines.raw: [u2297 | 02:53:18.740-02:53:25.689 | DM] If the wall between this place, where we're standing right now, and our world collapsed tomorrow, imagine the…

sourceLines.text: for so long, that was understood. And then in these last years, which apparently you're now telling me were a thousand years ago, for these last years.
sourceLines.raw: [u2300 | 02:53:36.390-02:53:44.659 | DM] for so long, that was understood. And then in these last years, which apparently you're now telling me were a thousand years ago, for these last years.
